consent.title: We use cookies
consent.body: We use analytics cookies to understand how you use our site and improve your experience. You can accept or reject non-essential cookies.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Update your display name and how others see you.

changeEmail.title: Change email
changeEmail.prompt: We sent a verification link to your new address. Click it to confirm the change.
changeEmail.description: We'll send a verification link to the new address.
changeEmail.hint: Your current email stays active until you verify the new one.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.successBody: Your password has been changed. Sign in again on other devices.
changePassword.description: New password must be at least 12 characters.
changePassword.successHint: Other active sessions remain valid until they expire.

delete.title: Delete account
delete.description: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All your data, workspaces, and settings will be permanently deleted.

signup.verifyPrompt: We sent you a verification link. Click it to activate your account.
signup.checkEmailHint: The link expires in 24 hours. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.
signup.title: Create account
signup.description: Start winning EU tenders with AI agents.

forgot.checkEmailBody: If an account exists for that address, you'll receive a reset link shortly.
forgot.checkEmailHint: The link expires in 1 hour. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.
forgot.title: Reset password
forgot.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.

reset.invalid: This reset link is missing or has expired.
reset.title: Set new password
reset.description: Choose a strong password of at least 12 characters.

verify.error: This link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
verify.success: You're all set. Redirecting you now…

search.label: Search
search.error: Search is unavailable right now — try again in a moment.

meta.title: tendersbay — EU public tenders, awarded by your AI agents
meta.description: AI agents that hunt down the right public tenders across Europe, demolish the paperwork, and walk your SME from the first tender opportunity all the way to the award.

hero.titleLead: The tender they already counted as theirs?
hero.subtitle: A tender with your name on it closes tonight. The big players have a team on it. You have three tabs open in Excel. That ends here — AI agents that find it, gut the paperwork, and put you on the bid. While you sleep.

proof.lead: Over two trillion euro of public money is spent across Europe every year. Most of it moves through tenders you never see.

items.label: public spend a year across the EU
public buyers putting work out to tender
tenders a year — no team reads them all

problem.title: The game was rigged to keep you out. It's working.

items.title: Buried across 27 countries
items.body: The tenders that fit you sit scattered on dozens of national portals, in languages you don't speak, in formats that fight back.

items.title: Drowning in paperwork
items.body: Specs, certificates, ESPD, deadlines. Miss one line and weeks of work hit the bin.

items.title: No bid office, no shot
items.body: The giants have a team for this. You have nights, weekends, and a spreadsheet. Guess who wins.

agents.title: Here's what your agents did while you slept.
agents.lead: Not a faster search box you still have to drive. A team of agents that works the whole tender — find, prepare, win — overnight, so you wake up already in the running.

items.title: It found the one that fits
items.body: While the market slept, the agents swept all 27 countries and pulled the single tender worth your time — matched to what you actually do, not a keyword dump.

items.title: It built the paperwork
items.body: Requirements read, certificates matched, the ESPD assembled, every deadline logged. The bureaucracy that used to burn your weekend — done before the coffee.

items.title: You woke up in the running
items.body: No blank page. The spec turned into a bid strategy, ready for your call — the same firepower the giants pay a whole office for, waiting on your desk.

audience.title: One of these is you. You already know which.

items.title: You run the bids
items.body: Midnight, another ESPD by hand. Hand the documents to the agents. Spend your hours on the offer that actually wins.

items.title: You own the number
items.body: Your bid team is the bottleneck on public growth. More tenders, same headcount — that's not a feature, it's a change of scale. With the numbers to prove it to the board.

items.title: You multiply across clients
items.body: Every client is a different world, and every saved hour is one more client you can take. Separate workspaces, clean data per client, your margin.

assurance.title: Ask the questions that usually kill the deal.

items.title: “Does my data train your AI?”
items.body: No. Your specs, your price lists, your bids stay yours. Never fed to anyone's model.

items.title: “Will it just make things up?”
items.body: It reads the actual tender and cites the page. Every requirement traces back to the document — no invented specs.

items.title: “Is each client's data really separate?”
items.body: Walled-off workspaces per client. What's theirs stays theirs. Nothing leaks across accounts.

items.title: “Does it fit what I already use?”
items.body: It slots into your stack. It doesn't ask you to throw anything out.

vision.title: Public money sits behind a velvet rope. We're cutting it.
vision.body: Hundreds of billions move through European public procurement every year — and stay out of reach for anyone without the time, the languages, or a bid office. AI agents change the math. Every SME gets a real shot.
vision.note: We're building. Your country is next.

coverage.title: 27 countries. We're taking them one by one.
coverage.body: We're rolling out across the European Union, market by market. Every flag lights up the day your country goes live.
coverage.note: Coverage is rolling out across all 27 EU countries.

cta.title: Your agents are ready. The only thing missing is you.
cta.body: Create your account and put the agents on your market — find, prepare, win, without a bid office of your own.

empty.title: No tenders found
empty.description: Try a broader query or fewer filters.

tenders.error: Search is unavailable right now — try again in a moment.

resume.title: Pick up where you left off

explore.title: Find your next tender
explore.description: Ask the agent about markets, requirements, or a specific call — personalised recommendations will appear here as your search profiles take shape.
